ground_truth.title: Quality Dental Care | Equitas Health Dentistry Services
ground_truth.main_content: Let your smile show how good it feels to be healthy. At Equitas Health, your whole person healthcare can include quality, comfortable, and affordable dental care. New Hours: Now open MON - FRI, 9 AM - 6 PM! Dental care should make you smile. At Equitas Health, you get quality dentistry in a full-service health center with a trained and caring staff. Our team of dentists, dental assistants, and dental hygienists works with you to explore how best to meet the needs of you and your family. We offer Emergency Dental Care, Preventive Care including Cleanings, Exams & x-rays, Oral cancer screening, and Oral hygiene training, Restorative Care including Fillings (amalgam and composite), Crowns, and Extractions & root canals, as well as Removable services like Dentures, Partials, Tooth whitening, and Mouthguards/nightguards. We accept insurance and our dental clinics accept Medicaid and most major private insurance plans. If you do not have insurance, or your insurance does not make your dental care affordable, please apply for our sliding fee scale. You deserve a healthy mouth! Payment will be due at the time of service. For procedures, you will pay half (50%) of the total cost when you make your appointment. The rest of your payment will be due at the time of service. Without dental insurance, if you qualify for the Sliding Fee Discount program, you will get a 35% discount on the regular cost of dental procedures.
